info.title: Framework for Method Ringing - Cross References

section.para: 1. Introduction 2. Versioning 3. Fundamentals of Method Ringing 4. Method Classification 5. Method Naming 6. Performance Reporting 7. Record Lengths 8. Method Extension 9. Related Roles Appendices A. Place Notation B. Method Name Syntax C. Leadhead Codes D. Extension Processes E. False Courseheads F. Framework Principles G. Version 2 Development H.
